form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (24.98) over 435m at Sale. Has the inside draw this time. Has ability and should run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and fell turning off back straight.
Crossed out entering home straight and raced wide.
Checked turning out of front straight and fell.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 2.5 lengths third (26.17) over 460m at this track. Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in her races, The latest effort was a 9 length fourth over 510m at Sale. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Shifted out on home turn and collided.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (22.99) over 400m at this track. Tough draw to overcome and needs to bounce back.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time when fifth (25.20) at Sale in a Mix 6/7. Will jump from box 8 for the first time. Looks a key chance on best form.
